description: The Black Mafia Family (BMF) is a drug trafficking and money laundering organization founded in 1985 in Detroit, Michigan by brothers Demetrius and Terry Flenory. It distributed cocaine across the United States with ties to Mexican cartels and used a hip-hop record label as a front. The organization was dismantled by federal indictments in 2005, with the Flenory brothers sentenced to 30 years in prison.

country_links.evidence_quote: direct links to Mexican drug cartels
country_links.context: The Black Mafia Family had direct links to Mexican drug cartels as a source for cocaine shipments.
